title: Agent Card v1
description: Agent Card for an LSP Brain acting as an A2A peer. Published at /.well-known/agent-card.json. Declares identity, capabilities, transport, and authentication. Consumed by peer Brains (parent/child, local/external) to discover and invoke this Brain.

id.description: Unique identifier for this Brain instance. Stable across restarts.

version.description: Brain software version (e.g., '0.1.0'). Informational; does not imply protocol compatibility.

interface_version.description: agent-output-v1 interface version this Brain produces. Consumers match this against their expectations.

capabilities.description: Which A2A message types this Brain accepts as a server and emits as a client.

accepts.description: Message types this Brain can receive and act on.

streaming.description: Whether this Brain supports long-running tasks with progress streaming (SSE).

protocol.description: Wire protocol. 'http+sse' is RECOMMENDED (default); 'json-rpc' is permitted for compatibility.

tasks_path.description: Path suffix for task endpoints. Default: '/tasks'.

authentication.description: Auth scheme for this peer. 'none' is the zero-trust-network default. 'bearer' enables per-client scope tokens (required for multi-tenant and remote-agent topologies). Mutual TLS remains a future addition.

scheme.description: 'none' — no auth (use only on trusted networks or behind a firewall). 'bearer' — the client MUST send 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' on every task request. Token issuance and validation are implementation-defined; reference implementation uses hashed storage with constant-time comparison and per-token rate-limit profiles.

topology.description: Optional: this Brain's role in a fractal composition / dual brain topology.

role.description: 'project' = leaf child in fractal comp. 'ecosystem' = parent aggregator. 'local'/'external' = dual brain halves.

parent_id.description: brain_id of the parent in a fractal tree, if any.
